onChange.script:
# Fires once on view-load (now(0) is single-eval -> binding evaluates true).
	# Calls resetFilter which seeds dates + runs Apply.
	if previousValue and previousValue.value != currentValue.value:
		self.rootContainer.resetFilter()

transforms.code: return [{"label": "(All)", "value": None}] + [{"label": t.get("Name"), "value": t.get("Code")} for t in (value or [])]
return [{"label": "(All)", "value": None}] + [{"label": s.get("Name"), "value": s.get("Code")} for s in (value or [])]

config.expression: if({view.custom.totalCount} < 1000, "Showing " + {view.custom.totalCount} + " rows", "Showing first 1000 of " + {view.custom.totalCount} + " — narrow your filter")

config.script:
#if self.view.custom.sortingApplied:
	#	self.view.custom.sortingApplied = False
	#	return
		
	sel = self.props.selection.selectedRow
	if sel is None:
		return
	idx = sel
	rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.props.data) or []
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(rows):
		return
	data = rows[idx] or {}
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-config-change-detail",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfigChangeDetail",
		modal=True,
		draggable=False,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"id":                data.get("Id"),
			"loggedAt":          data.get("LoggedAt"),
			"userDisplayName":   data.get("UserDisplayName"),
			"logEntityTypeName": data.get("LogEntityTypeName"),
			"entityId":          data.get("EntityId"),
			"logEventTypeCode":  data.get("LogEventTypeCode"),
			"logSeverityCode":   data.get("LogSeverityCode"),
			"description":       data.get("Description"),
			"oldValue":          data.get("OldValue"),
			"newValue":          data.get("NewValue"),
			"popupId":           "mpp-config-change-detail"
		}
	)

customMethods.name: applySearch
customMethods.script:
oldSelection = self.getChild("MainSplit").getChild("ContentArea").getChild("AuditPanelWrapper").getChild("AuditPanel").getChild("AuditTable").props.selection.selectedRow
	result = BlueRidge.Audit.ConfigLog.search(self.view.custom.filter)
	self.view.custom.rows       = result["rows"]
	self.view.custom.totalCount = result["totalCount"]
	
	newSelection = self.getChild("MainSplit").getChild("ContentArea").getChild("AuditPanelWrapper").getChild("AuditPanel").getChild("AuditTable").props.selection.selectedRow
	#if oldSelection != newSelection:
	#self.view.custom.sortingApplied = True

customMethods.name: resetFilter
customMethods.script:
import system
	now = system.date.now()
	self.view.custom.filter = {
		"startDate":      system.date.addDays(now, -7),
		"endDate":        now,
		"entityTypeCode": None,
		"logSeverityCode": None,
		"appUserId":      None,
		"searchText":     ""
	}
	self.applySearch()
